title: Cops Discover Bodies in Woman's Trunk During Traffic Stop

beats.description: Cold open with officers reacting to a foul smell and discovering a disturbing object in the trunk.
Narrator establishes the routine traffic stop, fake tags, and initial interaction with Nicole and BB.
Backup arrives, officers investigate the putrid odor, and begin cutting through layers of trash bags in the trunk.
The suitcase is opened, revealing a decomposing child's body, leading to immediate arrests.
Officers struggle with visceral shock and trauma while securing the scene and transporting suspects.
Processing at the station, BB's confusion, and Nicole's isolated muttering and guilt.
Suspects are moved to interrogation rooms as the overwhelming odor forces the use of air scrubbers.
Detectives interview Nicole, uncovering a second child's remains and her initial admissions of abuse.
Detailed timeline of neglect, medical examiner findings, and contradictions in Nicole's story emerge.
Legal proceedings, guilty plea, sentencing, and family fallout conclude the case.
